title: The Shut-in Vampire Goes Outside
overview: Komari knows she’s a bottom-tier vampire and has questions that need answers. How did she become a Crimson Lord? Why does she have an army? And who is this maid in her room?

title: A Sudden Insurrection
overview: The life of an army commander is never dull, as questionable officers, an assassin, and even a duel can attest to.

title: The Darkness of the Shut-in Vampire Princess
overview: Komari comes face to face with the one who bullied her three years ago.

title: The Mercy of the Lonely Crimson
overview: Komari knows she’s weak, but she can’t abandon Vill. She will fight Millicent, even if her chances of winning are low.

title: Sakuna Memoir and the Seven Crimson Lords
overview: High-level officials are being murdered and Komari is tasked with hunting down the terrorist responsible alongside a Crimson Lord wanting revenge against her killer.

title: A Roundtable of Lowlives
overview: Komari’s future hangs in the balance when another Crimson Lord calls for her impeachment.

title: The Scarlet Stage
overview: The Crimson Lords hold a competition where the contestant with the lowest score must resign.

title: Wheels of Asterism
overview: Sakuna shares a personal tragedy with Komari, but just as their bond deepens, another Crimson Lord makes his presence known.

title: A Warblade Tea Party
overview: Komari receives a tea party invitation from the Moonpeach Princess to ease tensions between their two countries, which convinces the Crimson Lord that it’s an obvious trap.

title: The Princess of Aruka Kingdom
overview: It’s not every day that one unintentionally starts a war, but that’s the situation Komari finds herself in. At least things can’t get any worse, right?

title: The Dream-Crushing Paradise
overview: The fighting rages on and alliances are tested.

title: A Golden World
overview: Nelia’s determination to stop Rainsworth grows stronger, but she cannot defeat him without Komari’s help.
